hero.name: Abdulrahman Alhuwais
hero.description: Senior Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience delivering banking and enterprise solutions across CRM, backend systems, DevOps, and cloud platforms.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Experienced in modernizing legacy applications, improving software quality, and building scalable solutions.
about.bio1: I'm a Senior Software Engineer with over 4 years of professional experience delivering banking and enterprise solutions across CRM, backend systems, DevOps, and cloud platforms.
about.bio2: My journey spans across top Saudi institutions including Saudi Aramco, Al Rajhi Bank, Minthar, and Albilad Bank, where I've modernized legacy applications, automated deployments, and built scalable solutions that enhance operational efficiency.

education.label: Education
education.university: King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals

certifications.label: Certifications
items: Microsoft Certified: Power Platform Functional Consultant (PL-200)

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey across Saudi Arabia's top organizations.

items.title: Software Engineer Intern
description: Developed desktop and web applications based on requirements gathered from multiple business departments

items.title: Software Engineer
description: Developed Dynamics CRM solutions including plugins, workflows and services
Designed and implemented a CI/CD pipeline for CRM solution deployment
Built operational and monitoring tools that improved administration and support efficiency
Code reviews and promoted best practices to improve delivery quality and reduce risks

items.title: DevOps Engineer
description: Established reusable CI/CD templates for IIS-hosted applications using Bitbucket
Built an ETL pipeline from web scraping external APIs to transformed analytical databases
Managed cloud infrastructure and SQL Server cloud migrations
Automated administrative and maintenance tasks using PowerShell and SQL jobs

items.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Re-implemented public-facing banking APIs from legacy ASMX services to modern .NET Core architecture
Developed branch appointment management module for customers on SharePoint
Designed and developed internal tools for notifications, archival, document scanning, and data migration
Resolved security vulnerabilities and contributed to CRM CI/CD pipeline implementation
Provided third-level production support for critical banking systems

products.title: My Products

products.ctaSubtitle: I'm open to building custom solutions and collaborating on interesting projects.

items.name: Auto Scroll
items.description: Automatically scroll through web pages with customizable speed and direction. Perfect for reading long articles, browsing social media feeds, or hands-free web browsing.

items.name: Popup Tabs Blocker
items.description: Block unwanted popup windows and tabs that websites try to open without your permission. Enjoy a cleaner, less intrusive browsing experience.

items.name: Work Item Notification
items.description: A notification system for Azure DevOps Work Items. Get real-time alerts and updates on work item changes, assignments, and status updates.

items.name: Family Unit
items.description: A family management platform to organize events, share memories, and stay connected with loved ones. Keep your family organized and engaged.

items.name: Almoosa Family Site
items.description: A professional website showcasing services and information. Built with modern technologies for optimal performance and user experience.

items.name: Detect & Port Scanner
items.description: Network security tool that identifies port scanning activity by monitoring for 15 or more consecutive ports within a 5 second window from a single source.

items.name: GPA Calculator
items.description: Academic tool that processes course records with weights and letter grades to compute GPA accurately.

items.name: K-Anonymization
items.description: Data privacy implementation applying the K-Anonymization algorithm for anonymizing datasets and protecting sensitive information.

items.name: PicSteg
items.description: Image steganography application with Hide/Unhide modes for embedding and extracting secret data within images.

items.name: Bulk Delay Subtitle
items.description: SRT subtitle file processor for adjusting timing by adding or subtracting delays to sync subtitles with video.
